subcodes.first_line: This night, being among the nights of the blessed month of Ramadan, wisdom hath ordained that We should observe the fast in the evening [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این لیل از لیالی ماه مبارک رمضانست حکمت اقتضا نمود صوم اختیار کردیم در شب
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @law of fasting, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
